summary: User wants to build an app related to Navodaya (likely Navodaya Vidyalaya school system). Project direction is set.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Wide landscape banner illustration of a school campus with lush greenery, a flagpole, and a grand academic building in warm maroon and golden tones (navodaya-hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Circular emblem/badge illustration featuring a book, a torch of knowledge, and decorative border in deep maroon and golden-yellow colors (navodaya-emblem.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Build a frontend dashboard with sections for: Home (school overview and latest announcements), Students (profile listing and details), Notices Board (school announcements), and Exam Schedule (timetable view).

Apply a cohesive visual theme inspired by Navodaya Vidyalaya's identity: use deep maroon and golden-yellow as primary colors, clean academic typography, structured card-based layouts with subtle borders, and a professional institutional look. Enforce this theme consistently across all pages and components.
Generate and display a school portal hero banner image and a Navodaya logo/emblem illustration as static assets in the app header and home page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Build an app related to Navodaya (Navodaya Vidyalaya)

Create a backend actor with data models and storage for Navodaya Vidyalaya school information, including: student profiles (name, class, house, roll number), announcements/notices, and exam schedules.
